headline.purpose: Section headings, workspace and project names.

title.purpose: Card headings, sidebar labels, active nav items.

body.purpose: Issue content, descriptions, comment text. 65ch max width.

label.purpose: Field labels, section headers (uppercase). Uppercase only for sidebar section headers.

mono.purpose: Issue keys only (PROJ-1, BUG-42). Never for general labels.

shadows.name: drag-lifted
shadows.purpose: Applied to an issue card being dragged. Combined with violet ring-2 ring-violet-400.

shadows.name: modal-overlay
shadows.purpose: Modal dialogs only. Separates the panel from the blurred backdrop.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover bg, focus ring). Ease-out-expo feel.

motion.name: drag-tilt
motion.purpose: Applied via CSS transform on drag start. Static; not animated. Suppressed via prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The sole call-to-action. Used for create, save, submit. Violet fill marks it as the primary action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; background: #7c3aed; color: #fff; font-family: 'Geist Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #6d28d9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fff, 0 0 0 4px #7c3aed; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Supporting actions: cancel, back, secondary operations. Neutral fill, no accent.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; background: #f3f4f6; color: #111827; font-family: 'Geist Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #e5e7eb; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fff, 0 0 0 4px #7c3aed; } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive actions only: delete issue, delete workspace. Red fill makes the cost visible.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; background: #dc2626; color: #fff; font-family: 'Geist Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #b91c1c; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fff, 0 0 0 4px #dc2626; } .ds-btn-danger:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Single-line text field. Used for issue titles, workspace names, search.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-label { font-family: 'Geist Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #374151; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-input { height: 36px; width: 100%; padding: 0 12px; background: #ffffff; color: #111827; font-family: 'Geist Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 6px; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9ca3af; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: transparent; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #7c3aed; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Pill badge showing issue status. Color is project-defined; the badge uses a 12% tint background + full-opacity text.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--badge-color) 15%, transparent); color: var(--badge-color); font-family: 'Geist Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-badge-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--badge-color); flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Issue Card
components.description: The primary content unit of the Kanban board. Priority icon + title + issue key. Flat at rest; lifts on drag.
components.html:
↗

Add OAuth provider support

AUTH-7Jun 3
components.css: .ds-issue-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; cursor: grab; user-select: none; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-issue-card:active { cursor: grabbing; } .ds-issue-card-top { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; } .ds-priority { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; margin-top: 2px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-priority-lowest { color: #94a3b8; } .ds-priority-low { color: #60a5fa; } .ds-priority-medium { color: #facc15; } .ds-priority-high { color: #fb923c; } .ds-priority-highest { color: #f87171; } .ds-issue-title { font-family: 'Geist Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #111827; line-height: 1.4; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .ds-issue-title:hover { color: #7c3aed; } .ds-issue-card-bottom { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 10px; } .ds-issue-key { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 12px; color: #9ca3af; } .ds-issue-date { font-family: 'Geist Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #9ca3af; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Single nav link in the sidebar. Active state uses the violet tint background. Default is transparent.
components.html: BoardList
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 6px 8px; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; font-family: 'Geist Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #4b5563; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), color 120ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #f3f4f6; color: #111827; } .ds-nav-item--active { background: #ede9fe; color: #6d28d9; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }

narrative.overview:
Every pixel earns its place the same way a gauge does: by telling you something true about the state of the system. The JiraClone interface is a cockpit in daylight — every element is functional, nothing is decorative chrome. When you land on the Kanban board, you see work, not the product's marketing. The sidebar carries wayfinding; the board carries signal; the accent color fires only when something demands attention.

The typography is tight and unbranded (Geist Sans, a workhorse not a personality), the surfaces are near-white and near-black with thin, honest borders. The violet accent is restrained to ≤10% of any screen: active nav states, primary buttons, issue drag handles, focus rings. Its rarity is the point.

This system explicitly rejects: Monday.com/ClickUp colorful overload (pastel-rainbow columns, feature-badge sidebars, marketing-UI disguised as a tool) and Jira's nested modal hell. There is one depth at a time. State is communicated by color; structure is communicated by space.
keyCharacteristics: Dual-mode (light/dark) with near-white and near-black surfaces, not gray-gradient theater
One accent (violet-600 / #7c3aed) used sparingly and consistently
Priority and status indicators are the only multi-color elements
Borders are always single-weight, never accent-colored stripes
Typography scale compressed into 4 sizes; weight carries the hierarchy
Spacing varies for rhythm; same padding everywhere is monotony

rules.name: The One Instrument Rule
rules.body: Violet is used on ≤10% of any screen. It marks where to act, not what the product looks like. Adding violet to a new element is a claim that this element is the most important action on screen.

rules.name: The State-First Rule
rules.body: Color communicates status, priority, or interactive state. It never communicates personality or decoration. If a color has no functional meaning, remove it.

rules.name: The Two-Size Rule
rules.body: Nearly all UI text is either 14px or 12px. Hierarchy lives in weight and color, not scale. Only page-level headings break to 18px or 24px.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces rest at their tonal level with borders, not shadows. Shadows appear only as a response to state (dragging, modal overlay).

dos: Do use #7c3aed (Instrument Violet) as the sole accent.
Do use weight contrast (400 vs 600) to establish hierarchy within the 14px size.
Do let the status color live in the badge background tint and column header dot.
Do keep issue cards flat at rest. The drag shadow and ring are the only lift.
Do use 1px borders at the canonical colors.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion. Suppress drag tilt and transitions at the OS level.
Do use Geist Mono only for machine-generated identifiers (issue keys).
donts: Don't add border-left or border-right wider than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards, list items, or sidebar items.
Don't use violet as a background fill on content surfaces.
Don't add a second accent color.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't add glassmorphism to cards, sidebar, or navigation.
Don't add celebration animations, empty-state mascots, or success color flashes.
Don't build a hero-metric template anywhere in the product.
Don't use Tailwind's purple-600 (#9333ea) — use violet-600 (#7c3aed).
